title: Christmas Season
description: Lightweight Christmas event plugin for Paper and Spigot 1.21 with biome snow, global snowstorms, decoration drops, gifts, elves and snowmen, controlled via the /xmas command, requires Java 21.
body:
# Christmas Season

**Christmas Season** is a lightweight Christmas event plugin for Paper/Spigot 1.21 (Java 21).  
It brings snow, gifts, elves, decoration drops and snowmen to your server – all controlled through the `/xmas` command.

> ⚠️ **Requirements**
> - Minecraft: **1.21.x**
> - Server: **Paper** or **Spigot** (most Bukkit forks will work)
> - Java: **21**

---

## Features

- ❄ **Snow biomes & snow cover**
  - Configurable **snow world** (`snowWorld` in `config.yml`)
  - Biome-based snow cover: turn whole biomes like `SNOWY_PLAINS` into snowy landscapes
  - Performance-friendly processing using tick batches (`intervalTicks`, `maxChunksPerRun`, `playerBubble`, etc.)
  - Optional **restore** feature to revert modified chunks/blocks as far as possible

- 🌨️ **Snowstorms**
  - Global snowstorm effect by controlling your server weather
  - Configurable modes (`auto`, forced on/off)
  - Automatic on/off cycles based on configurable intervals

- 🎄 **Christmas decoration**
  - Periodic **decoration drops** with the custom item name `§aWeihnachts-Deko`
  - Fully configurable drop items (`decoration.drops`)
  - Optional glowing items (`decoration.glow`)
  - Despawn time and spawn interval are configurable

- 🎁 **Gifts**
  - Global gift spawns in intervals
  - Multiple loot tables: `common`, `extra`, `rare` (e.g. cookies, sweet berries, ice, diamonds, netherite scrap, etc.)
  - Configurable lifetime and spawn chance per interval
  - Optional broadcast on spawn (`gifts.broadcastOnSpawn`)
  - Manual spawn command `/xmasgift`

- 🧝 **Elves & helpers**
  - Configurable **elves** and **helpers** (Wichtel) via `wichtel.*` and `elves.*`
  - Automatically spawn in the configured world(s)
  - Max count per world and spawn intervals are configurable
  - Add extra Christmas atmosphere to your server

- ☃️ **Snowmen**
  - Automatic snowman spawns
  - Configurable: maximum number, spawn interval, attack range and attack chance
  - Can interact with mobs in a classic snow golem–style defense

- 🛡️ **Protection & listeners**
  - Listeners for snow, gifts, decoration, snowmen and elves
  - Focus on **server performance** and predictable effects
  - Everything can be disabled centrally if you want to pause the event

---

## Commands

```text
/xmas
/xmas on
/xmas off
/xmas status
/xmas reload
/xmas biome <subcommand>
/xmas storm <subcommand>
/xmasgift
